item.name: Burabura Chochin Whistle
item.description: A hand-carved whistle that, when played, emits an eerie tone that beckons your burabura chochin to your side.

mount.name: Burabura Chochin
mount.action: Summon forth your burabura chochin, a kindred spirit in wandering.
mount.description: Contrary to expectation, this lantern ghost did not care to haunt people, and was content to simply wander Mount Rokkon. When it saw you similarly wandering, it took you for a kindred spirit and decided to follow you wherever the wind should blow.
mount.tooltip:
Could they be evil spirits, lying in
wait for hapless treasure seekers?
- Zukin
